was a [rugby league](/wiki/Rugby_league "Rugby league") football team made up of professional players in the [National Rugby League](/wiki/National_Rugby_League "National Rugby League"). These players were selected by fan vote. However, fans were only allowed to select one player from each NRL team to join the [Australian rugby league team](/wiki/Australian_rugby_league_team "Australian rugby league team") captain and the [New Zealand national rugby league team](/wiki/New_Zealand_national_rugby_league_team "New Zealand national rugby league team") captain. Two other players were selected by the NRL All Stars coach. This team played in the annual [NRL All Stars Game](/wiki/NRL_All_Stars_Game "NRL All Stars Game") against the [Indigenous All Stars](/wiki/Indigenous_All_Stars_(rugby_league) "Indigenous All Stars (rugby league)"). They were replaced in 2016 by a [World All Stars](/wiki/World_All_Stars "World All Stars").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Representative rugby league team

NRL All Stars

| Team information | |
| --- | --- |
| Governing body | [Australian Rugby League Commission](/wiki/Australian_Rugby_League_Commission "Australian Rugby League Commission") |
| Head coach | [Wayne Bennett](/wiki/Wayne_Bennett_(rugby_league) "Wayne Bennett (rugby league)") |
| Captain | [Beau Scott](/wiki/Beau_Scott "Beau Scott") |
| Most [caps](/wiki/Cap_(sport) "Cap (sport)") | [Benji Marshall](/wiki/Benji_Marshall "Benji Marshall") |

The **NRL All Stars team** was a [rugby league](/wiki/Rugby_league "Rugby league") football team made up of professional players in the [National Rugby League](/wiki/National_Rugby_League "National Rugby League"). These players were selected by fan vote. However, fans were only allowed to select one player from each NRL team to join the [Australian rugby league team](/wiki/Australian_rugby_league_team "Australian rugby league team") captain and the [New Zealand national rugby league team](/wiki/New_Zealand_national_rugby_league_team "New Zealand national rugby league team") captain. Two other players were selected by the NRL All Stars coach. This team played in the annual [NRL All Stars Game](/wiki/NRL_All_Stars_Game "NRL All Stars Game") against the [Indigenous All Stars](/wiki/Indigenous_All_Stars_(rugby_league) "Indigenous All Stars (rugby league)"). They were replaced in 2016 by a [World All Stars](/wiki/World_All_Stars "World All Stars").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=NRL_All_Stars_team&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This section **does not [cite](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citing_sources "Wikipedia:Citing sources") any [sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this section](/wiki/Special:EditPage/NRL_All_Stars_team "Special:EditPage/NRL All Stars team") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and [removed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability#Burden_of_evidence "Wikipedia:Verifiability"). *(May 2025)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

The first NRL All Stars team was assembled in [2010 All Stars Match](/wiki/2010_All_Stars_Match "2010 All Stars Match") to play against the Indigenous All Stars on 13 February. After a tight game the Indigenous All Stars won due to a last minute try from [Jamie Soward](/wiki/Jamie_Soward "Jamie Soward"). The final score was 16–12.

During the voting in 2010, the Australian rugby league team and New Zealand national rugby league team vice-captains, [Cameron Smith](/wiki/Cameron_Smith_(rugby_league,_born_1983) "Cameron Smith (rugby league, born 1983)") and [Adam Blair](/wiki/Adam_Blair "Adam Blair") were selected by default but this rule was dropped the following year. The NRL All Stars were captained by [Darren Lockyer](/wiki/Darren_Lockyer "Darren Lockyer") in 2010 and 2011. [Benji Marshall](/wiki/Benji_Marshall "Benji Marshall") took over the role in 2012 after Lockyer's retirement. Wayne Bennett's Coach's choice selections in 2011 were [Petero Civoniceva](/wiki/Petero_Civoniceva "Petero Civoniceva") and [Kurt Gidley](/wiki/Kurt_Gidley "Kurt Gidley") and in 2012 were [Luke Lewis](/wiki/Luke_Lewis "Luke Lewis") and [Ben Hornby](/wiki/Ben_Hornby "Ben Hornby"). Ben Hornby was ruled out with injury and Bennett selected Hornby's Dragons teammate [Nathan Fien](/wiki/Nathan_Fien "Nathan Fien") to replace him.

For voting, there are two stages. First fans nominate two forwards and two backs from each club from the NRL to take part in stage 2. For stage 2, the coach selects a position for each of the selected players and it is the fans' job to form a team, with one player from each club only.

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=NRL_All_Stars_team&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Squads")]

For the complete list of NRL All Stars players, see [List of NRL All Stars players](/wiki/List_of_NRL_All_Stars_players "List of NRL All Stars players").
